title: psyllium pumilum
intro: Psyllium pumilum is a type of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae, commonly known as the small or dwarf psyllium. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to soothe digestive issues, lower cholesterol levels, and help control blood sugar levels. The health benefits of Psyllium pumilum include promoting regular bowel movements, reducing inflammation, and supporting healthy gut bacteria, making it a popular natural remedy for various gastrointestinal issues. Psyllium pumilum can be prepared as a herbal supplement in the form of capsules, tablets, or powder, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
